subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all meaning and utterance, befitteth the Lord of all possibility, Who hath illumined the world with the light of His knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از معانی و بیان مالک امکانرا لایق و سزاست که عالم را بنور عرفانش منور
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
